results.title: Ex Machina
results.overview: Caleb, a coder at the world's largest internet company, wins a competition to spend a week at a private mountain retreat belonging to Nathan, the reclusive CEO of the company. But when Caleb arrives at the remote location he finds that he will have to participate in a strange and fascinating experiment in which he must interact with the world's first true artificial intelligence, housed in the body of a beautiful robot girl.

results.title: EX MACHINA
results.overview: One day, an unknown existence appears and announces that everyone will die. To survive judgment day, those who have witnessed the death of their immediate family members must share their lives with those around them.

results.title: Appleseed: Ex Machina
results.overview: As members of ESWAT, the elite forces serving Olympus, Deunan and Briaereos are deployed anywhere trouble strikes. Olympus finds itself under a stealth attack - cyborg terrorism, deadly nanotech zealots, and rioting citizens are just some of the threats that Deunan must contend with as she fights to save Olympus!

results.title: Deus Ex Machina
results.overview: An egotistical businessman gets closer and closer to his own fate - he receives a ton of speeding fines, an accident is only a matter of time. One day a superior force tries to inform him.

results.title: Sonus ex Machina
results.overview: The man has created a machine capable of hearing plants, and something more.

results.title: Mika Ex Machina
results.overview: For several months, Mika has been finding strange things on his motorcycle every day: red ribbons, coins, locks... Until a mini-cadenas hidden in the chain of her engine almost causes a serious accident. Determined to find the culprit, she films her bike remotely with the help of her friends. Soon, everyone's fantasies and projections cloud the issue. Harassment, flirtation or revenge? Is the situation romantic, romantic or threatening? Mika and the gang investigate.

results.title: Deus ex Machina
results.overview: An earnest boy must fight for his life after oppression confronts him and his friends on their way to school.

results.title: Deus ex machina
results.overview: It's all in a days work for the man inside the photo booth at a train station; His crush, unnerving children, clowns and murder.

results.title: Celebritas Ex Machina
results.overview: In this cavalcade of cameos, the souls of celebrities are ensnared in robot bodies and forced to be at the beck and call of a keeper obsessed with the fictional personas that made them famous.

results.title: Deus Ex Machina
results.overview: A cartoonist in the midst of a crisis uses a publishing house to look for work. The drawings of this one are not to the liking of the head of the publishing house which triggers a series of ungrateful events that they must try to solve.

results.title: Deus ex Machina
results.overview: A young woman wakes up in a strange bed after a one-night stand.

results.title: Chaos Ex Machina
results.overview: Where are we headed? This is the question asked, not by an ancient Greek philosopher, but by a dysfunctional, nihilistic GPS navigator. Woe betide those who turn it on! A bizarre experimental film that attempts to follow a road that continually changes scale… and ends up in the scenery.

results.title: Deus Ex Machina
results.overview: If it hasn't been filmed it hasn't happened. It happened the way it was filmed.

results.title: Deus Ex Machina
results.overview: A librarian is tasked with solving the case of a serial killer.

results.title: Deus ex Machina
results.overview: The illusion breaks down when the viewer can see the strings.

results.title: Deus ex machina
results.overview: A description of two nude bodies.

results.title: Digitaria Ex Machina
results.overview: “This is a Saturday, all my friends are dead”. The film meets Digitaria as they tour South America releasing their second album: Emotion-simulation.
